title: US Over-regulation Gives China AI Advantage! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that US over-regulation in AI, modeled after EU approaches, disadvantages American development and advantages China. The claim is that regulatory caution is ceding global AI dominance to China.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that US AI regulation, modeled on EU-style approaches, slows American development and hands an advantage to China. The core claim: regulatory caution is ceding global AI dominance to China. It frames AI safety rules as a competitive liability rather than a safeguard.
